title: Feline Rebalanced (Origins Mod)
description: A rebalanced version of the feline origin!
body:
---
![Shows the changes between the "Weak Arms" power](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a07c69c6a6069a7ed62045e49f374484089f8dfc.png)
---
![Shows the changes between the "Nocturnal" power](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b458e6fd037aa0b0d75f49277f58d959db0b24cf.png)
---

# Powers

<details>
<summary>Acrobatics</summary>
You never take fall damage, no matter from which height you fall.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Strong Ankles</summary>
You are able to jump higher by jumping while sprinting.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Velvet Paws</summary>
Your footsteps don't cause any vibrations which could otherwise be picked up by nearby lifeforms.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Nine Lives</summary>
You have 1 less heart of health than humans.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Weak Arms</summary>
When not under the effect of a strength potion, you are much slower when mining all blocks.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Catlike Appearance</summary>
Creepers are scared of you and will only explode if you attack them first.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Nocturnal</summary>
You can slightly see in the dark, but less so under water.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Carnivore</summary>
Your diet is restricted to meat, you can't eat vegetables.
</details>
